---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# NPE KnowledgeBase
:::

The NPE KnowledgeBase is a private study hub for National Psychology Exam preparation and clinical practice resources.

::: jump-nav
[Overview](#overview){.jump-link}
[How access works](#access-flow){.jump-link}
[Request access](#request-access){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Overview {#overview}

::: role-section
::: role-block
[What this is]{.role-title}
[A private member space for approved users to access shared resources, session information, and study materials.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Who it is for]{.role-title}
[Peers and colleagues preparing for the NPE who have been approved for access.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[What to expect]{.role-title}
[You request access here, requests are reviewed manually, and approved users are then added to the member list.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## How access works {#access-flow}

1. Submit a request using the form below.
2. Your request is reviewed.
3. If approved, your email is added to the approved users list.
4. You receive the private member login link.

::: about-section
[Get in touch →](../contact.qmd){.about-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Request access {#request-access}

```{=html}
<style>
.npe-form-wrap {
	max-width: 640px;
	border: 1px solid var(--border);
	border-radius: var(--radius);
	background: var(--bg-card);
	padding: 1rem;
	box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.npe-form {
	display: grid;
	gap: 0.8rem;
}
.npe-field {
	display: grid;
	gap: 0.25rem;
}
.npe-label {
	font-size: 0.8rem;
	font-weight: 600;
	color: var(--navy);
}
.npe-input,
.npe-textarea {
	width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	border: 1px solid var(--border);
	border-radius: 8px;
	background: var(--bg-card);
	color: var(--text);
	padding: 0.55rem 0.7rem;
	font: inherit;
	outline: none;
}
.npe-input:focus,
.npe-textarea:focus {
	border-color: var(--navy);
	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(30, 58, 42, 0.08);
}
.npe-textarea {
	min-height: 110px;
	resize: vertical;
}
.npe-actions {
	display: flex;
	gap: 0.5rem;
	flex-wrap: wrap;
	margin-top: 0.1rem;
}
.npe-btn {
	display: inline-flex;
	align-items: center;
	justify-content: center;
	border-radius: 999px;
	padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
	font-size: 0.82rem;
	font-weight: 700;
	text-decoration: none !important;
	border: 2px solid var(--navy);
	cursor: pointer;
}
.npe-btn-primary {
	background: var(--navy);
	color: #fff;
}
.npe-btn-secondary {
	background: transparent;
	color: var(--navy);
}
.npe-status {
	display: none;
	margin-top: 0.5rem;
	padding: 0.65rem 0.8rem;
	border-radius: 8px;
	font-size: 0.85rem;
}
.npe-status.ok {
	display: block;
	background: #dcfce7;
	color: #166534;
}
.npe-status.fail {
	display: block;
	background: #fee2e2;
	color: #991b1b;
}
</style>

<div class="npe-form-wrap">
	<form id="npe-access-form" class="npe-form" onsubmit="return submitAccessRequest(event)">
		<input type="hidden" name="access_key" value="03b4348e-774c-4e7b-9300-f9f602cecc75">
		<input type="hidden" name="subject" value="NPE KnowledgeBase access request — connorconkeymorrison.com">

		<div class="npe-field">
			<label class="npe-label" for="npe-name">Name</label>
			<input class="npe-input" id="npe-name" name="name" type="text" required>
		</div>

		<div class="npe-field">
			<label class="npe-label" for="npe-email">Email</label>
			<input class="npe-input" id="npe-email" name="email" type="email" required>
		</div>

		<div class="npe-field">
			<label class="npe-label" for="npe-message">Reason for access</label>
			<textarea class="npe-textarea" id="npe-message" name="message" required></textarea>
		</div>

		<div class="npe-actions">
			<button type="submit" class="npe-btn npe-btn-primary" id="npe-submit">Request access</button>
			<a class="npe-btn npe-btn-secondary" href="mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com?subject=NPE%20KnowledgeBase%20access%20request">Email instead</a>
		</div>

		<p id="npe-status" class="npe-status"></p>
	</form>
</div>

<script>
async function submitAccessRequest(event) {
	event.preventDefault();

	const form = document.getElementById('npe-access-form');
	const status = document.getElementById('npe-status');
	const submit = document.getElementById('npe-submit');

	status.className = 'npe-status';
	status.textContent = '';
	submit.disabled = true;
	submit.textContent = 'Sending...';

	try {
		const response = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', {
			method: 'POST',
			body: new FormData(form)
		});
		const result = await response.json();

		if (!result.success) throw new Error(result.message || 'Submission failed');

		status.className = 'npe-status ok';
		status.textContent = 'Request sent. I will follow up with access details after review.';
		form.reset();
	} catch (error) {
		status.className = 'npe-status fail';
		status.textContent = 'Request failed. Please try again or email directly.';
	} finally {
		submit.disabled = false;
		submit.textContent = 'Request access';
	}

	return false;
}
</script>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: role-section
::: role-block
[Already have access?]{.role-title}
[Use your member login link and sign in with the approved Google account. If your access is pending, contact me directly.]{.role-desc}

```{=html}
<!-- Replace MEMBER_LOGIN_URL with your deployed Apps Script web app URL -->
<a id="member-login-btn" class="npe-btn npe-btn-secondary" href="https://script.google.com/macros/s/PASTE_YOUR_DEPLOYMENT_ID/exec" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Member login →</a>
<script>
(function () {
	var btn = document.getElementById('member-login-btn');
	if (!btn) return;
	if (btn.href.indexOf('PASTE_YOUR_DEPLOYMENT_ID') > -1) {
		btn.href = 'mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com?subject=NPE%20KnowledgeBase%20member%20login';
		btn.removeAttribute('target');
		btn.textContent = 'Member login (contact me) →';
	}
})();
</script>
```
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
[Back to Clinical overview →](index.qmd){.about-link}
:::
